name_en: New Version: 5BB142, Miu's new bowling bag, a flagship item from the official website, an absolute hit this year🔥 style, top-tier imported calfskin, Miu's unique Matelasse pattern, exquisite and structured body, front engraved logo matches the leather color, detachable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap, cotton satin lining, with zippered pocket, worn by many celebrities and influencers, size 22X10.5X7.5Cm, comes with original packaging
